title: SiriusExperience
description: This modpack searchs to enhance the vanilla experience with visuals, sounds and fps..
body:
# SiriusExperience!![REVAMP]
##  A modpack that tries to enhance the vanilla experience with animations, sounds, vfx and fps enhancements
## (Please keep in mind that this modpack is highly customizable, if you dont like or have issues with any mod, feel free to modify it to your liking!)

### > -This project is still in develoment so bugs are expected
###  
### > -Compatible with almost any mod!
### 
### > -We only will make updates for 1.21 versions and up
### 
### 
### If u want the normal file, u can convert it here: [MrpackConverter]
